meta.title: Our Services | JANUS Linguistic Agency Lyon
meta.description: Language training, interpreting, on-site support and translation. JANUS, your B2B linguistic partner in Lyon.

hero.label: Our services
hero.title: Five services. One partner.
hero.subtitle: Each service standalone or as a complete package. Training, interpreting, on-site, translation — you choose.

services.title: Language training
services.desc: Bespoke programmes for your teams. Qualiopi-certified — eligible for CPF, OPCO or PDC funding.
items: English, Polish, FLE and 3 other languages

services.title: Professional interpreting
services.desc: Native interpreters for your negotiations, audits and sensitive meetings. NDA signed before every assignment.
items: FR ↔ EN · FR ↔ PL · FR ↔ DE · FR ↔ ES

services.title: On-site support
services.desc: Physical presence during your critical missions. Beyond translation: real-time cultural decoding and strategic advice.
items: Supplier audits, factory visits, due diligence
Trade shows in France and Poland

services.title: Professional translation
services.desc: 6 languages. Native translators assigned by area of expertise. Quote within 2h on document submission.
items: Native translators only, into their mother tongue

services.title: On-site project manager
services.desc: A dedicated JANUS expert for the full duration of your critical mission. Not a one-off interpreter — a single point of contact, present from start to finish.
items: Due diligence, acquisition, opening an overseas office

cta.title: Which service fits your need?
cta.subtitle: Free quote within 24h. First conversation is confidential.
